raw.official description: Distance travelled while using Charge regenerates your Barrier Field by 200 per second.
raw.ability details:
* Removed in Reign of Talon Season 1: Conquest
* If the barrier has been destroyed, this will still recharge barrier health, however it will not cause the barrier to become available faster.

raw.official description: Refund a charge of Fire Strike When you stun an enemy, overfilling up to 3.
raw.ability details: * The 3rd fire strike charge persists after dying.

raw.official description: While using Barrier Field, your passive health regeneration triggers 75% sooner.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18, Re-added Reign of Talon Season 1: Conquest''
* It is the first removed perk to be re-added

raw.official description: Charge damage grants temporary overhealth for 100% of the damage dealt.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Both bump and pin damage count.
* Overhealth starts to decay at a rate of 50/s when the duration ends.

raw.official description: Barrier Field is healed for 100% of Fire Strike's damage dealt.
raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Crusader's_Fire.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Crusader's Fire|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Crusader's Fire|Crusader's Fire]] in Season 16. * If the barrier has been destroyed, Fire Strike damage will still recharge barrier health, however it will not cause the barrier to become available faster.

raw.official description: For each enemy you hit with Fire Strike, gain 2 seconds of 25% increased attack speed.
raw.ability details: * Additional hits from new casts of Fire Strike will stack with the duration from the first cast.

* Replaced in [[Season/2026|Season 1: Conquest]] with the Stalwart sub-role. * Reduces the initial velocity from knock back effects by 30%. For example, [[File:Ability-Lucio5.png|sub|link=Lúcio#Soundwave|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lúcio#Soundwave|Soundwave]] sends its victims back 17 m/s, but for Reinhardt, it is 11.9 m/s. * The distance in which Reinhardt is knocked back is NOT reduced by 30%; it is reduced by more. This is because the velocity has to accelerate back to normal; a higher initial velocity means more time at higher velocities and more time with a velocity in general. * Does not affect [[File:Ability Orisa Halt!.png|sub|link=Orisa#Halt!|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Halt!|Halt!]], [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]], [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]], or [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] because they are not knock back effects.

abilities.name: Charge

raw.shot type:
[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Charge forward and smash an enemy against a wall.
raw.cast time:
0.6 + 0.5 seconds (wall impact)
0.6 + 0.1 seconds (canceled)
raw.duration:
3 seconds (charge, max)
0.3 seconds (charge, min)
0.65 seconds (stun on wall hit)
raw.ability details: * Reinhardt can cancel the charge by pressing the ability button again. * Reinhardt can turn while charging but his control is reduced. * If Charge directly collides with an enemy, that enemy is "pinned" (stunned), and if they hit a wall, the pinned target takes the wall hit damage. If Charge ends before hitting a wall, no damage is inflicted, but the target will remain stunned for an additional 0.65 seconds. Only 1 enemy can be pinned at a time. * If Charge indirectly collides with an enemy, or if there is already a target pinned, the enemy is knocked away and takes 50 damage. * Colliding with any immovable entity, such as Orisa during [[File:Ability Orisa Fortify.png|sub|link=Orisa#Fortify|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Fortify|Fortify]] or [[File:Overrun_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Overrun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Overrun|Overrun]], is also treated as a wall impact. ** Colliding with deployables is also treated as a wall impact, but also deals half of Reinhardt's pin damage to the deployable. *** Charging into Illari's healing pylon disables it for a short time. * Abilities that make the target [[phased out]], like [[File:Protection_Suzu_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Protection Suzu|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Protection Suzu|Protection Suzu]] or [[File:Ability-reaper2.png|sub|link=Reaper#Wraith Form|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reaper#Wraith Form|Wraith Form]], can prevent a target from being pinned, but once hit the effect can only be removed by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]]. * Abilities that make the target [[invincible]], like [[File:Ability-zarya3.png|sub|link=Zarya#Projected Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Projected Barrier|Projected Barrier]] or [[File:Ability-zenyatta4.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Transcendence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Transcendence|Transcendence]], do not prevent or remove the pinned effect, but can prevent the target from taking damage. * If Charge collides with [[File:Rocket_punch.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Rocket Punch|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Rocket Punch|Rocket Punch]], [[File:Shield Bash.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Shield Bash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Shield Bash|Shield Bash]], a charging [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]], or another ''Could not find 'Charge' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', both participants get [[Crowd Control#Knock Down|knocked down]] for 1.7 seconds. Any pinned targets will be damaged as if they hit a wall. * Charge can break tether effects (except [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]] because it disables movement abilities). * Reinhardt's visible character model is shifted to the right in the Charge animation, causing his left shoulder, rather than the middle of his body, to be the center of his hitbox. Due to this disparity, players should focus on the crosshair position over the character model when aiming. ** Tl;dr: Left shoulder pins, right shoulder boops * Charge's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

duration.raw:
3 seconds (charge, max)
0.3 seconds (charge, min)
0.65 seconds (stun on wall hit)

raw.ability details: * Fire Strike stops if it collides with terrain or a terrain-like [[object]], like [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]]. ** Pierces [[barrier]]s, enemies, and other damageable entities. ** Collision against walls is checked against the center of the projectile.

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.fire rate: 1.04 shots/s
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: ~104 while swinging * Reinhard does not have a [[quick melee]] attack. Attempting to use it swings the Rocket Hammer instead. * Rocket Hammer knocks back enemies in the direction of the swing. * The direction of consecutive swings alternates, starting counter-clockwise. * Activating ''Could not find 'Fire Strike' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', ''Could not find 'Barrier Field' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', ''Could not find 'Charge' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' or ''Could not find 'Earthshatter' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' interrupts the swing animation. * The hitbox of the swings lingers slightly longer at the end position of the hammer. * Rocket Hammer is not reflected when blocked by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]].

[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: While Barrier Field is active, use Primary Fire to damage and knockback enemies.
raw.ability details: * Can be used while airborne. * The hitbox is blocked by enemy barriers, however it is possible to hit "through" them if the origin of the hitbox, i.e. your barrier, travels past theirs. * Shield Slam does '''not''' have the stalemate behavior, where colliding with other charging abilities, like [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]] and [[File:Shield Bash.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Shield Bash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Shield Bash|Shield Bash]], causes a knockdown.

raw.official description: Hold [[File:Key mouse 2.png|20x20px|link=]] to deploy a frontal energy barrier.
raw.ability details: * Using ''Could not find 'Fire Strike' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', ''Could not find 'Charge' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' or ''Could not find 'Earthshatter' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' automatically puts down the barrier to cast the ability. To use Rocket Hammer, the barrier must be first manually released. * Barrier health regenerates at a rate of 150 per second after being down for 2 seconds. * Barrier Field is a channeled ability, If Reinhardt is hacked, slept, stunned and knocked down, it will be released. ** Holding secondary fire also raises back the barrier automatically when the cast resolves if Fire Strike or Earthshatter was used. * The center of shield relative to Reinhard is shifted ~0.075 m to the left. * Changing the direction of the character's gaze (and hence the shield zone) takes time. It takes ~0.14 seconds to be able block something what was exactly behind you. * By holding the primary fire key, Reinhardt can look around at his surroundings without turning. * The barrier cracks once at 50% and again at 25%. At 20%, Reinhardt will [[Reinhardt/Quotes#Abilities|say]] his barrier is failing.

abilities.name: Earthshatter

raw.shot type: [[File:Tectonic Shock icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shockwave|Shockwave ]] Shockwave
raw.official description: Knock down all enemies in front of you.
raw.ability details: * Requires line of sight. ** Earthshatter will be stopped by barriers, even if the damage from Earthshatter breaks the barrier. * Earthshatter has a small amount of vertical height (1.77 meters), allowing it to affect enemies in the air. ** This distance is calculated as the difference between the height of the enemy and the height of the surface over them. ** By jumping off the payload at the right time, you can usually gain enough height to avoid being hit. * Earthshatter is a channeled ability and it is interrupted by becoming hacked, stunned or knocked down. * Earthshatter deals an additional 150 damage within 1.75m of the impact area. This counts as a [[critical hit]]. * While casting Earthshatter Reinhardt ingnores collision with other heroes. * If Reinhardt is/becomes airborne while casting Earthshatter, the cast will not finish until he hits the ground. * Reinhardt is unaffected by [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]] while casting Earthshatter. * [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]] cannot be used on Reinhardt while he is casting Earthshatter. Activating Earthshatter will also interrupt an active pull.
